---
title: "Dispatch Optimisation — Run Report"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    page-layout: full
    theme: cosmo
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        img { max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; }
        </style>
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import os, sys
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import tomllib

# Make plot.py importable from the same directory as this report
repo_root = Path(__file__).parent if "__file__" in dir() else Path.cwd()
sys.path.insert(0, str(repo_root))
import plot as pl

_env_run = os.environ.get("RUN_DIR")
if _env_run:
    run_path = Path(_env_run)
else:
    run_path = Path(open(".current_run").read().strip())
params   = tomllib.load(open(run_path / "params.toml", "rb"))
df       = pl.load_data(run_path)
```

## Run metadata

```{python}
from IPython.display import display, Markdown

r = params["run"]
s = params["solver"]

dirty_flag = " ⚠ uncommitted changes" if r.get("git_dirty") else ""
display(Markdown(f"""
| | |
|---|---|
| **Label** | `{r['label']}` |
| **Date** | {r['date']} |
| **Description** | {r['description'] if r['description'] else '—'} |
| **Git hash** | `{r.get('git_hash', '—')}`{dirty_flag} |
| **Solver status** | {s['status']} |
| **Objective (g fuel)** | {s['objective']:,.1f} |
| **Solve time** | {s['solve_time_s']:.2f} s |
"""))
```

## Model formulation

The unit commitment and economic dispatch problem is formulated as a mixed-integer linear program (MILP).

**Sets**

- $\mathcal{G}$ — generators; $\mathcal{T}$ — timesteps; $I_g$ — SFOC breakpoints for generator $g$

**Decision variables**

| Variable | Domain | Description |
|---|---|---|
| $u_{g,t}$ | $\{0,1\}$ | Commitment status |
| $P_{g,t}$ | $\geq 0$ | Power output [kW] |
| $\lambda_{g,t,i}$ | $[0,1]$ | SOS2 interpolation weights |
| $P^{ch}_t,\, P^{dis}_t$ | $\geq 0$ | Battery charge / discharge power [kW] |
| $E_t$ | $[E^{min}, E^{max}]$ | Stored energy [kWh] |
| $z_t$ | $\{0,1\}$ | Charge mutex ($1$ = charging) |
| $s_t$ | $\geq 0$ | SOC deviation auxiliary |

**Objective — minimise total fuel flow plus SOC deviation penalty**

$$
\min \sum_{g,t,i} \lambda_{g,t,i}\, f_{g,i}\, P_{g,i}
  \;+\; \lambda_{\text{soc}} \sum_{t} s_t
$$

**Subject to**

Power balance:
$$\sum_{g} P_{g,t} + P^{dis}_t - P^{ch}_t = D_t \qquad \forall\, t$$

Generator limits and SOS2 piecewise-linear SFOC:
$$
P^{min}_g\, u_{g,t} \leq P_{g,t} \leq P^{max}_g\, u_{g,t}
$$
$$
\sum_i \lambda_{g,t,i} = u_{g,t},\quad
P_{g,t} = \sum_i \lambda_{g,t,i} P_{g,i},\quad
f_{g,t} = \sum_i \lambda_{g,t,i} f_{g,i},\quad
(\lambda_{g,t,\cdot}) \in \text{SOS2}
$$

Battery energy evolution and mutual exclusion:
$$
E_{t+1} = E_t + \Delta t\!\left(\eta^{ch} P^{ch}_t - \tfrac{1}{\eta^{dis}} P^{dis}_t\right)
$$
$$
P^{dis}_t \leq z_t\, P^{dis,max}, \qquad P^{ch}_t \leq (1 - z_t)\, P^{ch,max}
$$

Terminal SOC constraint:
$$E_{|T|+1} \geq \text{SOC}^{ref} \cdot E^{max}$$

SOC deviation linearisation ($\|SOC_t - SOC^{ref}\|$ via epigraph):
$$
s_t \geq \tfrac{E_t}{E^{max}} - \text{SOC}^{ref}, \qquad
s_t \geq \text{SOC}^{ref} - \tfrac{E_t}{E^{max}}
$$

Symmetry breaking (identical generators):
$$P_{g,t} \geq P_{g+1,t} \qquad \forall\, g < |\mathcal{G}|,\, t$$

## Parameters

### Battery

```{python}
b = params["battery"]
batt_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "Parameter": [
        "Capacity $E^{max}$", "SOC min", "SOC max",
        "Max charge power", "Max discharge power",
        "Charge efficiency $\\eta^{ch}$", "Discharge efficiency $\\eta^{dis}$",
        "Initial SOC", "Timestep $\\Delta t$",
        "SOC reference", "SOC penalty weight $\\lambda_{soc}$",
    ],
    "Value": [
        f"{b['E_max']:.0f} kWh",
        f"{b['SOC_min']*100:.0f} %",
        f"{b['SOC_max']*100:.0f} %",
        f"{b['P_ch_max']:.0f} kW",
        f"{b['P_dis_max']:.0f} kW",
        f"{b['eta_ch']:.2f}",
        f"{b['eta_dis']:.2f}",
        f"{b['E_init']/b['E_max']*100:.0f} %  ({b['E_init']:.0f} kWh)",
        f"{b['dt']:.1f} h",
        f"{b['SOC_ref']*100:.0f} %",
        f"{b['soc_penalty']:.1f}",
    ],
})
display(batt_df.to_html(index=False, escape=False))
```

### Generators

```{python}
rows = []
for idx, g in enumerate(params["generators"], start=1):
    rows.append({
        "Generator": idx,
        "$P^{max}$ [kW]": f"{g['P_max']:.0f}",
        "$P^{min}$ [kW]": f"{g['P_min']:.0f}",
        "Breakpoints $P$ [kW]": ", ".join(f"{v:.0f}" for v in g["P"]),
        "SFOC [g/kWh]":         ", ".join(f"{v:.0f}" for v in g["SFOC"]),
    })
display(pd.DataFrame(rows).to_html(index=False, escape=False))
```

## Results summary

```{python}
wide = df.groupby("timestep").agg(
    load_kw    = ("load_kw",   "first"),
    total_fuel = ("fuel_gph",  "sum"),
    P_ch_kw    = ("P_ch_kw",   "first"),
    P_dis_kw   = ("P_dis_kw",  "first"),
    soc_pct    = ("soc_pct",   "first"),
).reset_index()

soc_ref_pct = b["SOC_ref"] * 100.0
soc_dev     = (wide["soc_pct"] - soc_ref_pct).abs()
hours_online = df[df["u"] == 1].groupby("generator")["timestep"].nunique()

summary = {
    "Total fuel consumed": f"{wide['total_fuel'].sum()/1000:.1f} kg",
    "Mean fleet fuel rate": f"{wide['total_fuel'].mean()/1000:.2f} kg/h",
    "Peak load": f"{wide['load_kw'].max():.0f} kW",
    "Mean SOC deviation from ref": f"{soc_dev.mean():.1f} pp",
    "Max SOC deviation from ref": f"{soc_dev.max():.1f} pp",
    "Min SOC reached": f"{wide['soc_pct'].min():.1f} %",
    "Terminal SOC": f"{wide['soc_pct'].iloc[-1]:.1f} %",
    **{f"Gen {g} hours online": f"{h} h" for g, h in hours_online.items()},
}

display(pd.DataFrame(summary.items(), columns=["Metric", "Value"]).to_html(index=False))
```

## Figures

```{python}
pl.SAVE = False   # don't re-save PNGs from within the report
fig1, fig2 = pl.make_figures(run_path, show=False)
plt.figure(fig1.number)
plt.show()
```

```{python}
plt.figure(fig2.number)
plt.show()
```
